시편 85:1.content: Yahweh, you have been favorable to your land. You have restored the fortunes of Jacob.

시편 85:2.content: You have forgiven the iniquity of your people. You have covered all their sin.

시편 85:3.content: You have taken away all your wrath. You have turned from the fierceness of your anger.

시편 85:4.content: Turn us, God of our salvation, and cause your indignation toward us to cease.

시편 85:5.content: Will you be angry with us forever? Will you draw out your anger to all generations?

시편 85:6.content: Won’t you revive us again, that your people may rejoice in you?

시편 85:7.content: Show us your loving kindness, Yahweh. Grant us your salvation.

시편 85:8.content: I will hear what God, Yahweh, will speak, for he will speak peace to his people, his saints; but let them not turn again to folly.

시편 85:9.content: Surely his salvation is near those who fear him, that glory may dwell in our land.

시편 85:10.content: Mercy and truth meet together. Righteousness and peace have kissed each other.

시편 85:11.content: Truth springs out of the earth. Righteousness has looked down from heaven.

시편 85:12.content: Yes, Yahweh will give that which is good. Our land will yield its increase.

시편 85:13.content: Righteousness goes before him, And prepares the way for his steps.
